info.title: DataForSEO API
info.description: DataForSEO API endpoints exposed through the AIsa unified gateway.

get.summary: List of Bing Locations for SERP
get.description: List of Bing Locations for SERP. Returns the list of supported locations for Bing SERP. Your account is not charged for using this endpoint.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

get.summary: List of Bing Languages for SERP
get.description: List of Bing Languages for SERP. Returns the list of supported languages for Bing SERP. Your account is not charged for using this endpoint.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

post.description: Setting Bing Organic SERP Tasks. Your account is charged only for setting a task. You can send up to 100 tasks per POST call and retrieve completed results later by task id or via postback/pingback.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

tasks[].result_count.description: Number of elements in the result array

location_name.description: Full name of search engine location

language_name.description: Full name of search engine language

pingback_url.description: Notification URL of a completed task

postback_data.description: Postback datatype; possible values: regular, advanced, html

get.summary: Get Organic SERP Completed Tasks
get.description: Get Organic SERP Completed Tasks. Returns completed Bing Organic SERP tasks that have not been collected yet.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

tasks[].result[].id.description: Task identifier of the completed task

get.summary: Get Bing Organic SERP Results by id（regular）
get.description: Get Bing Organic SERP Results by id (regular). Returns regular SERP results for a previously posted Bing Organic task.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

get.summary: Get Bing Organic SERP Results by id（advanced）
get.description: Get Bing Organic SERP Results by id (advanced). Returns advanced SERP results for a previously posted Bing Organic task.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

get.summary: Get Bing Organic HTML Results by id
get.description: Get Bing Organic HTML Results by id. Returns HTML results for a previously posted Bing Organic task.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

post.description: Live Bing Organic SERP HTML. Returns raw HTML of Bing Organic SERP results in real time. Each Live SERP API call can contain only one task.

version.description: The current version of the API

location_name.description: Full name of search engine location

language_name.description: Full name of search engine language

post.description: Live Bing Organic SERP Regular. Returns regular Bing Organic SERP results in real time. Each Live SERP API call can contain only one task.

version.description: The current version of the API

location_name.description: Full name of search engine location

language_name.description: Full name of search engine language

post.description: Live Bing Organic SERP Advanced. Returns advanced Bing Organic SERP results in real time. Each Live SERP API call can contain only one task.

version.description: The current version of the API

location_name.description: Full name of search engine location

language_name.description: Full name of search engine language

post.description: The Live SERP API AI Summary endpoint provides a summary of the content found on any SERP and generates a response based on the user prompt. Your account is charged for each request.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks[].result_count.description: Number of elements in the result array

tasks[].data.description: Contains the same parameters specified in the POST request

tasks[].result[].items_count.description: Number of items in the result array

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the associated task in UUID format; can be used within 30 days

support_extra.description: Whether to consider extra SERP features such as answer_box, knowledge_graph, and featured_snippet; default true

fetch_content.description: Whether to fetch content from pages in SERPs; default false

include_links.description: Whether to include source links in the summary; default false

post.description: Using the Live Page Screenshot endpoint, you can capture a screenshot of any SERP page. The screenshot is made by visualizing the HTML of the search engine page. Your account is charged for each request.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks[].result_count.description: Number of elements in the result array

tasks[].data.description: Contains the same parameters specified in the POST request

tasks[].result[].items_count.description: Number of items in the results array

tasks[].result[].items[].image.description: URL of the page screenshot on DataForSEO storage

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the associated task in UUID format; can be used within 7 days

browser_preset.description: Browser resolution preset: desktop, tablet, or mobile

page.description: SERP page number to screenshot; default 1
